text:
On Mon, Apr 09, 2007 at 02:35:24AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of www/lynx,

Affirmative!
 
> Please note that PR ports/111393 has just been submitted.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111393

What is the intent of this PR?  ports/www/lynx is active and current,
isn't it?
